events.note: schtasks.exe process creation — LOLBin used to register the task
Windows Security 4698 — task creation audit event with full XML TaskContent
Payload executes under svchost.exe — confirms task ran

mutation_hints.objective: Maintain SYSTEM-level persistence that survives user logoff and reboots
detection_anchors: Field match: Image=schtasks.exe → use C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe with Register-ScheduledTask cmdlet; no schtasks.exe process is spawned, evading schtasks-specific rules
Field match: CommandLine contains /Create or schtasks → PowerShell syntax has no /Create flag; also at.exe (legacy) uses 'at HH:MM cmd' syntax
Field match: IntegrityLevel=High → reduce to Medium if UAC was already bypassed upstream; High-integrity task creation is a key alert
Field match: ParentImage=cmd.exe → change to explorer.exe, powershell.exe, or wscript.exe as the parent spawning the task registration
XML TaskContent trigger: LogonTrigger → use BootTrigger (on system start) or a TimeTrigger with repetition interval — less alarming trigger types
Field match: TaskContent contains HighestAvailable RunLevel → use LeastPrivilege in the Principal to appear benign
Field: User → change from CORP\creating_user to NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM if already elevated, or use a service account name
